raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "For-profit colleges are using complicated financial schemes and shell corporations to pose as nonprofit and public institutions.",
    "For-profit colleges are evading state oversight and misleading students.",
    "Nonprofit colleges are prohibited from profit taking and required to devote all of their revenue to their educational purpose.",
    "A decline in enforcement of nonprofit status by the federal Internal Revenue Service has allowed for-profit colleges to claim nonprofit status.",
    "Grand Canyon University reorganized to claim nonprofit status by splitting off its real estate and academic-related assets.",
    "Grand Canyon Education, Inc., takes about 60% of the tuition, fees, room, and board revenue earned by the non-profit Grand Canyon University.",
    "The President of the non-profit Grand Canyon University is also the CEO of the for-profit Grand Canyon Education, Inc.",
    "Ashford University has stated that it would follow Grand Canyon University's lead and claim nonprofit status.",
    "California Attorney General Xavier Becerra sued Ashford University for misrepresenting tuition fees and financial aid availability.",
    "The Chronicle of Higher Education investigated Ashford University and called it 'a poster child for the ills of the for-profit college sector.'"
  ]
}
```
